'''Joh'hanna Ghibbyyns''' was an infamous and hip [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] from [[Talus/Legends|Talus]]. She was the first to use a [[Tchotchee pistol]].<ref name="SWG" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1stm}}
